calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of Plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To May-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May 13,2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
